texto: I get annoyed when a self-indulgent writer just shows off what he knows but doesn't really tell a story. To me storytelling is first a craft. Then if you're lucky, it becomes an art form. But first, it's got to be a craft.. You've got to have a beginning, middle and end. And I have sort of applied the theatrical principles to writing. Throw the story in the air and see what's going to happen.
explicacao: Citação de Robert Ludlum sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I get annoyed when a self-indulgent writer just shows off what he knows but doesn't really tell a…” articula reflexao, writing, story em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.

frase_original: I get annoyed when a self-indulgent writer just shows off what he knows but doesn't really tell a story. To me storytelling is first a craft. Then if you're lucky, it becomes an art form. But first, it's got to be a craft.. You've got to have a beginning, middle and end. And I have sort of applied the theatrical principles to writing. Throw the story in the air and see what's going to happen.
